overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, heavy traffic, and crowds with umbrellas. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing the atmospheric Night City environment with holographic billboards and wet reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with digital billboards

events.description: waiting at intersection for vehicles to pass before crossing
stepping off the road onto the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: navigating through a busy intersection with heavy rain and neon reflections on the wet asphalt

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving through the intersection with headlights on

large colorful holographic advertisement screen displaying animated graphics
tall traffic signal pole with green light illuminated

tall street light casting bright white illumination through the rain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a wide urban intersection in a cyberpunk city at night. Heavy rain creates reflective pools on the asphalt while neon billboards illuminate the scene. The camera waits for a black SUV to pass before crossing the street toward the sidewalk.

events.description: passing under a building awning with intensified neon reflections on wet pavement
slight turn to navigate around a pedestrian group

agents.ego_description: walking along the rain-soaked sidewalk, passing pedestrians with umbrellas and neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: person holding a glowing purple umbrella walking alongside the camera

entered.detail: tall palm tree trunk visible against the neon-lit building facades
building entrance with bright pink and blue neon lighting

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wet concrete sidewalk, the camera passes a palm tree and various pedestrians carrying umbrellas. Neon storefronts line the left side while the street with sparse traffic runs parallel on the right. The rain creates shimmering reflections on the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection crossing leading to covered walkway under overpass

entering the covered area beneath the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: crossing the street in front of the Delamain building, navigating between vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: large building with prominent 'DELAMAIN' signage and corporate logo
elevated highway or monorail structure spanning across the street
yellow grid pattern painted on the road surface indicating pedestrian crossing

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the street at a yellow-grid crosswalk, passing in front of the Delamain building with its distinctive corporate signage. A red sports car drives through the intersection as the camera moves toward and enters the covered area beneath a large overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial corridor with food vendors and dense pedestrian traffic

events.description: passing a brightly lit neon food stall with pink and purple lighting
view briefly obstructed by a pedestrian with a large umbrella

agents.ego_description: walking through a crowded sidewalk corridor under neon signs, passing food stalls and dense pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: shirtless pedestrian with glowing orange cybernetic implant on chest walking toward camera

street vendor stall with bright pink neon lighting and umbrella
curved ramp structure leading up to the elevated highway

segments.scene_description: Walking through a densely populated corridor beneath the overpass, the camera passes the prominent Nicola sign and a brightly lit neon food stall. The sidewalk is crowded with pedestrians, including a shirtless individual with glowing cybernetic implants. The area is sheltered from the rain but illuminated by vibrant neon advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a wide, rain-slicked urban intersection into the dense atmosphere of a neon-lit city sidewalk. It begins at a bustling crossroads where heavy rain creates reflective pools on the asphalt under the glow of towering billboards, pausing briefly for a black SUV to pass. As the camera crosses the street, the perspective shifts from the open road to the narrow confines of a wet concrete walkway. The scene then expands along the sidewalk, passing a solitary palm tree and pedestrians with umbrellas while shimmering reflections dance across the pavement. Finally, the movement continues past a row of vibrant neon storefronts that line the path, contrasting with the sparse traffic flowing on the parallel street.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from an open, rain-slicked intersection into the dense, neon-lit shelter of a city underpass. It begins by crossing a yellow-grid crosswalk in front of the corporate signage of the Delamain building, passing a red sports car as it navigates the intersection. As the camera moves forward, the open street gives way to the heavy concrete architecture of a large overpass, transitioning the environment from an exposed roadway to a sheltered urban corridor. The scene then expands into a crowded pedestrian zone illuminated by vibrant advertisements, passing a glowing Nicola sign and a neon food stall. Finally, the camera pushes through the throng of people, including a shirtless individual with glowing cybernetic implants, deep within the brightly lit subterranean atmosphere.
